summary: Implemented M4 campaign grain supply reservations, consumption, release, and forecast query only. The change adds explicit M4 grain supply reservation records sourced from M2 population-group grain stockpiles, deterministic controlled-source allocation, carried/consumed/shortage/loss accounting, release back to original stockpiles, and forecast reason codes for insufficient grain and seasonal risk. No UI, route capacity, market economy, march execution, battle, siege, save-format milestone, server, Rust/WASM, or production dependency work was added.

tests_run.result: Before handoff: modified packages/protocol/src/index.ts, packages/sim-core/package.json, packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts, packages/sim-core/src/world-state-v0.ts, tests/protocol-command-query-schema.test.ts; untracked tests/sim-core-m4-grain-supply.test.ts.

1 test file passed; 5 tests passed. Covers grain conservation/no creation, no negative carried supply, deterministic source allocation, reservation release, shortage reason ordering, wrong actor, duplicate reservation, duplicate/empty release, shortage, overflow, and malformed state validation.
17 test files passed; 118 tests passed. Includes tests/sim-core-m4-grain-supply.test.ts in the package script.
1 test file passed; 8 tests passed. Added schema coverage for reserve, consume, release, preview query, and invalid loss reason.

tests_run.result: format:check, lint, workspace typecheck, and architecture:check passed. Earlier formatting/lint reruns found and fixed Prettier issues in touched files and one unused test import before this final pass.

decisions: R3 risk acknowledged: this touches WorldState and GameCommand/protocol surfaces; handoff routes to systems_architect for review.
Supply reservation uses explicit M4 records keyed by GrainSupplyReservationId plus deterministic M2 population-group source lines.
Reservation deducts M2 grain into carried M4 supply; consumption burns carried grain only; release returns remaining carried grain to the original M2 stockpile source.
Source allocation is deterministic: controlled districts for the campaign owner, ordered by districtId then populationGroupId, with no route capacity or market behavior.

Forecast uses planned M4 muster commitments, existing carried reservations, controlled M2 grain available to reserve, integer grain-per-troop-per-day demand, and M2 seasonal monsoon risk at the target district.
risks: Protocol command/query kinds were extended for this M4 task; systems_architect should verify that the R3 protocol change is acceptable before integration.
Save-format migration is intentionally not implemented per task scope, so persisted save DTO coverage remains unchanged until the relevant save-format milestone.
Forecast is intentionally bounded: it reports grain needs and seasonal risk but does not model route capacity, naval logistics, market economy, march execution, battle, or siege outcomes.
requested_action: Review M4-GRAIN-SUPPLY-001 for R3 architecture, protocol/schema suitability, deterministic resource conservation, command authority, invariant coverage, and scope discipline. Return ACCEPT, REQUEST_CHANGES, or BLOCK; do not mark ACCEPTED/CLOSED from this writer handoff alone.
